import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading as={"h1"} className={"openapi__heading"} children={"Batch Verify API Keys"}></Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/v2/admin/apiKeys:batchVerify"}
  context={"endpoint"}
></MethodEndpoint>

Verifies multiple credentials in a single request. Efficiently verifies up to 100 credentials in
parallel. Each credential is verified independently; partial failures are returned.

```http
POST /v2/admin/apiKeys:batchVerify
{
  "requests": [
    {"credential": "sk_live_abc123..."},
    {"credential": "eyJhbGciOiJFZERTQSI..."}
  ]
}
```

<Heading id={"request"} as={"h2"} className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails parameters={undefined}></ParamsDetails>

  {...require("./data-plane-service-batch-verify-api-keys.RequestSchema.json")}
></RequestSchema>
